name: labflow
description: Codex-native research coding skill toolbox with stage-driven discussion/design hooks, codebase research, external research, git task flow, Obsidian, PDF, and MCP support.

interface.longDescription: Labflow is a Codex skill toolbox for research coding: lightweight stage-driven discussion/design hooks, local codebase research, external evidence gathering, git task flow, research-friendly annotation, Obsidian CLI operations, PDF reading, and read-heavy background agents.
defaultPrompt: Use stage-idea-refine to discuss this research idea before planning.
Use stage-design-scaffold to externalize a mature design into TODOs and interface anchors.
Use codebase-research to investigate the asset generation pipeline.
Use git-task-flow to commit and push the current task.
